task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into OpenSIS as the administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard or main menu is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the course section edit page for 'Introduction to Literature' (ENG101).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the course section details or edit form for 'Introduction to Literature' or 'ENG101'.

task_completion.description: Verify the room assignment is changed to 205.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Room' input field contains the value '205' instead of '101'.

task_completion.description: Verify the period assignment is changed to Period 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Period' dropdown or selection field shows 'Period 3' or '3' selected instead of Period 1.

task_completion.description: Verify the changes to the course section are saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the course section was updated, or a view page showing ENG101 assigned to Room 205 and Period 3.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenSIS web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the OpenSIS web UI in a browser, not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the OpenSIS application running, not a text editor or a static mock page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success message or updated values.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target course code: ENG101. Target room: 205. Target period: Period 3 (short name: 3). Initial room: 101. Initial period: Period 1 (short name: 1).
